$schema: Workflow Kit manifest — declares what ships with the kit vs stays local
note: update-workflow is NOT deprecated -- it is the developer's personal vault sync skill. It does not ship with the kit because it is personal, not because it is replaced.

skills.on_push: Only push core_skills. Strip hardcoded paths and org-specific references.
skills.on_pull: Replace SKILL.md and references/. Never touch user's evals/ or workspace/ dirs.

templates.on_push: Push generalized versions. Strip org-specific bases, sections, or references.
templates.on_pull: Show diff. User chooses: keep local, take upstream, or merge.

claude_md.on_push: Push the repo's generalized CLAUDE.md. Never overwrite repo version with vault version.
claude_md.on_pull: Merge by section markers. Replace WFK:START/END blocks, preserve LOCAL:START/END blocks.

agents_md.on_push: Same as claude_md — push generalized version only.
agents_md.on_pull: Same section-marker merge. Never touch project-level agents.md files.
